story.text: *Auto-generated by `audit.js` each sync turn — page counts, broken links, leak-scan, orphans, cross-site refs. Reads only.*

Automated lint across 7 hosts (page count · broken links · leak-scan · orphans · cross-site refs). Re-run: `node audit.js`. Reads only.

| Host | Pages | Broken links | Leak-scan hits | Orphans | Cross-refs (broken) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| guide | 18 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 6 (0) |
| skill | 174 | 12 | 1 | 0 | 0 (0) |
| tomes | 166 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 184 (0) |
| research | 182 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 183 (0) |
| atlas | 700 | 0 | 4 | 0 | 259 (0) |
| library | 154 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 2 (0) |
| grimoire | 127 | 0 | 1 | 1 | 71 (0) |
| **total** | **1521** | **12** | **6** | **1** | **705 (0)** |

## Notes

- **Broken links** that aren’t 0 are usually benign in-content example ` ` (DSL/syntax samples). Confirm before acting.
- **Leak-scan hits** are *candidates*, not confirmed leaks — most are false positives (e.g. `chronicler` the persona, a canonical `*-audit` spec). Confirm each is content, not an internal record, before sealing.
- **Orphans** = pages with no inbound ` ` on their own host (hubs/index/node-lists excluded). A real orphan wants a cross-reference or a home on a hub.

### skill.guide.agentprivacy.ai
- broken links (12): agentprivacy-mapping: wikilink · agentprivacy-wiki-compact-references: wikilink · agentprivacy-wiki-llm-knowledge-base: wikilinks · agentprivacy-wiki-page: Wiki Link · agentprivacy-wiki-resync:   · agentprivacy-wiki-to-skill: Page Name
- leak-scan candidates (1): agentprivacy-chronicler

### atlas.guide.agentprivacy.ai
- leak-scan candidates (4): chronicler · ieee-7012-integration-plan-v2 · v41-chronicle-vertex · zk-tale-14-ipa-chronicle

### grimoire.guide.agentprivacy.ai
- leak-scan candidates (1): vertex-chronicle-vertex
- orphans (1): poem-the-city-of-mages-eb10
